# Nevada Spark Electric LLC

> Electrician serving Las Vegas, NV and surrounding areas. Nevada Spark Electric LLC provides quality electrician services in Las Vegas, NV. Licensed, insured, and locally trusted.

## Key Facts
- Business: Nevada Spark Electric LLC
- Category: Electrician
- Location: Serving Las Vegas, NV, Las Vegas, NV
- Phone: 702-555-0100
- Email: contact@nevada-spark-electric-llc.com
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 127 reviews
- Years in business: 1
- Jobs completed: 50

## Services
- [Wiring](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/electrician/nevada-spark-electric-llc//services/wiring/): Electrical wiring and rewiring for renovations, additions, and repairs.
- [Panel Upgrade](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/electrician/nevada-spark-electric-llc//services/panel/): Electrical panel upgrades, replacements, and safety improvements.
- [Lighting](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/electrician/nevada-spark-electric-llc//services/lighting/): Interior and exterior lighting installation, repair, and upgrades.
- [Outlets & Switches](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/electrician/nevada-spark-electric-llc//services/outlets/): Outlet and switch installation, repair, and GFCI upgrades.
- [Safety Inspection](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/electrician/nevada-spark-electric-llc//services/inspection/): Electrical safety inspections and code correction services.
- [Emergency Electrical](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/electrician/nevada-spark-electric-llc//services/emergency-electrician/): 24/7 emergency electrical service for urgent issues.
